title: Multilingual OCR Translator
subtitle: OCR workspace for reading, research, and on-screen text
api_keys_mask_hint: API keys are masked by default. Click the button on the right to reveal and edit them.
section_connection_intro: Choose or create a profile, fill in the Base URL, API keys, and model, then test the connection before saving.
section_translation_intro: Set target language, reading mode, triggers, and prompts so capture, selected text, and manual input all behave the way you expect.
section_advanced_intro: These options are optional. Tweak them after the connection is working.
page_settings_subtitle: Finish the connection and model check for the current profile first, then tune how translation, shortcuts, and display should behave.
page_monitor_subtitle: Inspect the latest capture and in-memory activity to confirm the workflow is behaving as expected.
prompt_preset_name_placeholder: e.g. Translate / Answer / Polish / Raw OCR
base_url_placeholder: Enter the compatible API root URL
model_placeholder: Enter a model name, or fetch the list first
prompt_template_placeholder: You can use the {target_language} variable. Text input is automatically appended after the template.
api_keys_hint: One key per line. Keys under the same URL will rotate automatically.
prompt_hint: Each preset can define one template for image requests and another for text requests. Available variable: {target_language}. Selected text and manual input modes automatically append the text body after the template, so you only need to write the instruction part.
close_to_tray_on_close: Clicking X minimizes to tray instead of quitting
hint: Finish the connection check first, then use the sidebar actions. Clicking X quits; the tray button minimizes to tray.
validation_failed: Please fix the highlighted fields first.
hotkey_recording: Press the new shortcut combination now
empty_result: The model returned no displayable content.
validation_base_url_scheme: Base URL must start with http:// or https://.
validation_api_keys_required: At least one API key is required.
validation_hotkey_requires_modifier: The shortcut must include at least one modifier key (Ctrl / Alt / Shift / Win).
validation_hotkey_recording: Finish recording the shortcut first, or press Esc to cancel.
validation_prompt_image_required: The image request prompt cannot be empty.
validation_prompt_text_required: The text request prompt cannot be empty.
cancel_request_unavailable: There is no active operation to cancel.
tray_unavailable: System tray is unavailable in this environment, so the app cannot be minimized to tray.
save_settings_aborted_hotkeys: Settings were not saved because hotkey registration failed: {error}
at_least_one_profile: At least one profile must remain.
at_least_one_prompt_preset: At least one prompt preset must remain.
logs_empty: No runtime activity yet. Start a capture, process selected text, or submit some text manually and entries will appear here.
logs_export_empty: There is no runtime activity to export yet.
selection_hint: Drag to select an area  ·  Esc / right-click to cancel
already_running_message:
OCR Translator is already running.

Please check the system tray or close the existing window before launching again.
unsaved_changes_message: You have unsaved changes. Save them before continuing?
preview_placeholder: Your latest screenshot preview will appear here after a capture finishes.
selected_text_empty: No usable selected text was captured. Select some text first and try again.
selected_text_processing: Selected text captured. Requesting the model...
runtime_settings_hint: Pin, opacity, font size, and overlay size changes made on the floating result window update the current settings immediately. Click “Save Settings” if you want to keep them for the next launch.
manual_input_hint: Enter the content to be handled by the current prompt preset. Press Ctrl+Enter to submit immediately.
manual_input_placeholder: Type the text you want to translate, answer, or polish...
builtin_prompt_preset_locked: Built-in prompt presets cannot be deleted. Duplicate one first if you want a removable custom preset.
log_request_ignored_capture_workflow: Request ignored because another capture workflow is still active.
log_request_ignored_background_busy: Request ignored because another background operation is still running.
log_models_stale_request: Discarded stale model list result from an older request.
log_models_stale_form: Discarded model list result because the API form changed while the request was running.
log_models_loaded: Loaded {count} models into the current form.
log_test_stale_form: Discarded stale API test result because provider, URL, key, or model changed while the request was running.
log_selected_text_capture_started: Attempting to capture selected text while preserving the clipboard when possible.
log_selected_text_empty: Selected text capture returned no usable text.
log_close_redirected_to_tray: Close button redirected to minimize-to-tray behavior.
